creator: berg2839@umn.edu
text:
https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/DateTime-TimeZone

2.02    2016-09-16
Replaced Params::Validate with Params::ValidationCompiler

We do not have a port for Params::ValidationCompiler and 2.03 does not seem to have anything important, so r422557 should be reverted until this port can have the correct dependency. Currently, this breaks many ports now that it barfs at runtime because it doesn't have Params::ValidationCompiler.
